problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: The key to What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? is Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus — specifically Deep brain stimulation — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
